summary: Comprehensive testing of MEC 1 Plan Auto-Adjudication features completed. All 6 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including MEC Financials section, Self-Insured badge, N/A utilization, No Stop-Loss badge, Fixed Cost vs Claims chart, and Financials tab in group creation.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height calculation (-1 values)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/claims with preventive CPT code (99385 + Z00.00) on MEC 1 member auto-adjudicates to 'approved' with $0 member responsibility
✅ Backend: POST /api/claims with non-preventive CPT code (99213) on MEC 1 member auto-adjudicates to 'denied' with 'Not a Covered Benefit'
✅ Backend: GET /api/groups/{id}/pulse for MEC group returns is_mec=true with total_premium and mgu_fees in stop_loss section
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/fixed-cost-vs-claims returns array with is_mec, total_premium, mgu_fees, claims_paid, surplus, margin_pct
✅ Backend: GET /api/groups/{id} returns MEC 1 plan with plan_template='mec_1' in attached_plans
✅ Backend: POST /api/groups with total_premium and mgu_fees fields creates group with financials
✅ Frontend: Groups page - MEC 1 badge visible in Acme Manufacturing group header
✅ Frontend: Groups page - MEC Financials section visible with Total Premium, MGU Fees, Surplus Bucket
✅ Frontend: Groups page - Self-Insured badge shows 'Self-Insured — No Stop-Loss Required'
✅ Frontend: Groups page - YTD Utilization shows 'N/A' for MEC group
✅ Frontend: Groups page - 'No Stop-Loss' badge visible on MEC 1 plan cards
✅ Frontend: Reports page - Fixed Cost vs. Claims Spend chart and table visible
✅ Frontend: Reports page - MEC 1 and Standard type badges in Fixed Cost table
✅ Frontend: Group create modal - Financials tab present with Total Premium and MGU Fees inputs
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts chart width/height warnings in console - consider adding explicit dimensions or minWidth/minHeight (LOW priority, does not affect functionality)
Preventive claim adjudication correctly validates member age against CPT code age ranges (99385 is for ages 18-39)
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing (TEST_MEC_*) linked to MEC 1 plan for claim adjudication tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEC 1 Plan Auto-Adjudication is fully functional. Key behaviors: (1) Preventive claims with Z-codes (e.g., 99385 + Z00.00) auto-approve at $0 member cost, (2) Non-preventive claims auto-deny with 'Not a Covered Benefit' message, (3) Group pulse analytics returns is_mec=true with MEC financials (total_premium, mgu_fees, surplus), (4) Fixed Cost vs Claims report shows all groups with is_mec flag and margin calculations, (5) UI correctly shows MEC Financials section instead of Stop-Loss for MEC groups, (6) Group creation modal has Financials tab with Total Premium and MGU Fees inputs. Note: Preventive service evaluation validates member age against CPT code age ranges.
